ddt:Target.Name: CDM_Sweet200_V2
ddt:Target.Description:
[N] 15/10/2019 BSA ZOUARI Mahmoud Initial Creation. V1
28/10/2019 [V1.1] Update DTC list ST30 21/01/2020 Update DTC liste ST30b Update DID liste ST30b
25/03/2020 [V1.2] Update DTC list ST40 Updae DID resolution and Offset Create Screen

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding Gen Failure Info
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level outofrange 0 adjust failure
signal has too few transitions events
signal has too many transitions events
alive sequence counter incorrect not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
CAN VDC or HEVC or ECM Comm fail (Clock)
[U2143]CAN comm err ECM/HEVC MAC CRC Receive
[U2165]CAN comm err SONAR MAC CRC Receive
[U2543]VDC HEVC ATCU CAN communication error CRC Receive
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Electrical system S / ABS control - Initial state (control application inactive)(00h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 2(02h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 3(03h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 4(04h)
Electrically controlled S / ABS control -CAN input signal abnormality detection(09h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - initial state (there is no ESA control application operation demand)(00h)
(TBD)S/ABS control - ESA control application operation demand(01h)

Data.Name: VMC_status.Flag for assistance operation of effective break feeling

Item.Text: EVC Not available as an actuator

Data.Name: Step on brake notice request flag

Item.Text: No warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(00h)
Warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(01h)

Data.Name: SSA_MS_SW_STAT.Select state flag of SSA ON / OFF
SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request
Output_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active.param

Item.Text: VMC Left revolution operation display On
VMC Right revolution operation display On

Data.Name: SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state

Item.Text: OutputControl.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
OutputControl.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state
REAR SUSPENSION WITH MULTI-LAYER ENERGY ABSORBER(00h)
WITH LANE KEEP ASSIST(01h)= not enable
WITH LANE SUPPORT SYSTEM (W/O LKA)(03h)=not enable
BLIND SPOT WARNING + CROSS TRAFIC ALERT(02h)
BLIND SPOT INTEREVNTION + CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT(04h)
BLIND SPOT WARNING + BACKUP COLLISION INTERVENTION + RR AEB(PEDESTRIAN)(06h)
BLIND SPOT INTERVENTION + BACKUP COLLISION INTERVENTION + RR AEB(PEDESTRIAN)(07h)
FR + RR SENSORS + IPA + PSM + FKP(03h)
FORWARD EMERGENCY BRAKING (CITY + INTER URBAN) + PEDESTRIAN(02h)
FORWARD EMERGENCY BRAKING + JUNCTION ASSIST + HEAD ON(04h)
NO EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(00h)
WITH EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(01h)

Data.Name: Contorol module malfunction status.CDM fail flag

Item.Text: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: Contorol module malfunction status.Master warning lamp command state
Electric throttle control status.ETC fail flag

Item.Text: exact torque request can not be achieved (measure imprecision)
transcient state preventing torque request realization
torque request can not be achieved
CC ON and ( awaiting or suspended)

Data.Name: Input_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active.param

Item.Text: VMC Left revolution operation display On
VMC Right revolution operation display On
OutputControl.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
OutputControl.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state

DataItem.Name: Contorol module malfunction status.CDM fail flag
Contorol module malfunction status.Master warning lamp command state
Electric throttle control status.ETC fail flag
VMC_status.Flag for assistance operation of effective break feeling

Request.Name: DataRead.Step on brake notice request flag

DataItem.Name: Step on brake notice request flag
SSA_MS_SW_STAT.Select state flag of SSA ON / OFF

Request.Name: DataRead.SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request
Request.Comment: Read SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request

DataItem.Name: SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request

Request.Name: OutputControl.start_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active

DataItem.Name: Input_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active.param
Output_SSAAutomatic brake hold SW lamp active.param

Request.Name: DataRead.DCMC active test execution status
Request.Comment: Read DCMC active test execution status

Request.Name: DataRead.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
Request.Comment: Read SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state

DataItem.Name: SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state

Request.Name: DataRead.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state
Request.Comment: Read SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state

DataItem.Name: SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state

Request.Name: DataRead.Master warning lamp command state
Request.Comment: Read Master warning lamp command state

Request.Name: DataRead.4WS_AnglePosition
Request.Comment: Read Copy Steering angle sensor value

Device.Name: [U2143]CAN comm err ECM/HEVC MAC CRC Receive
[U2165]CAN comm err SONAR MAC CRC Receive
[U2543]VDC HEVC ATCU CAN communication error CRC Receive
CAN VDC or HEVC or ECM Comm fail (Clock)

Step on brake notice request flag

SSA LED2 (In hard LED3) lighting request
